prediction.reasoning: Based on historical volatility analysis of DE (Deere & Company), the stock typically exhibits moderate volatility with annualized standard deviation around 25-30%. For a 20-day forecast, I applied a geometric Brownian motion model assuming slight positive drift reflecting agricultural sector fundamentals and recent earnings trends. The confidence intervals account for typical daily price movements of 1.5-2% standard deviation, scaled appropriately for the 20-day time horizon.
